imageAlt: Smart Capture Camera for Android roadmap item preview image
title: Smart Capture Camera for Android
summaryBody: As part of our migration from Sensibill to Textract, on Android we will replace the Sensibill camera with a FreeAgent camera based on ML Kit.
detailBody: As part of our migration from Sensibill to Textract, on Android we will replace the Sensibill camera with a FreeAgent camera based on ML Kit.
